# Usage

<!-- This is generated by scripts/generate-usage.sh. Don't edit this file directly. -->

<!-- docfresh begin
command:
  command: argd help-all
  hide_command: true
code_block: false
-->
```console
$ aqua-registry --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry - CLI to develop aqua Registry. https://github.com/aquaproj/registry-tool

USAGE:
   aqua-registry [global options] [command [command options]]

VERSION:
   0.4.1

COMMANDS:
   scaffold, s             Scaffold a package
   create-pr-new-pkg, new  Create a pull request to add new packages
   generate-registry, gr   Update registry.yaml
   init                    Create configuration files
   patch-checksum          Patch a checksum configuration
   check-repo              Check if GitHub Repository was transferred
   mv                      Rename a package
   connect, con            Connect to a Docker container with an interactive shell
   lint, l                 Lint a package
   remove, rm              Remove Docker containers
   remove-package, rmp     Remove a package from Docker containers
   resolve-conflict        Resolve registry.yaml merge conflict with main
   start                   Start Docker containers
   stop                    Stop Docker containers
   test, t                 Test a package in Docker containers
   version                 Show version
   help, h                 Shows a list of commands or help for one command
   completion              Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell

GLOBAL OPTIONS:
   --log-level string  log level [$AQUA_LOG_LEVEL]
   --help, -h          show help
   --version, -v       print the version
```

## aqua-registry scaffold

```console
$ aqua-registry scaffold --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry scaffold - Scaffold a package

USAGE:
   $ argd scaffold [options] <package name>

DESCRIPTION:
   Scaffold a package.

   e.g.

   $ argd scaffold cli/cli


OPTIONS:
   --deep                      This flag was deprecated and had no meaning from aqua v2.15.0. This flag will be removed in aqua v3.0.0. https://github.com/aquaproj/aqua/issues/2351
   --cmd string                A list of commands joined with single quotes ','
   --limit int, -l int         the maximum number of versions (default: 0)
   --local                     Run in local mode without Docker (simple scaffold only)
   --recreate, -r              Recreate Docker containers
   --no-create-branch, -B      Don't create a git branch
   --config string, -c string  Path to scaffold.yaml configuration file
   --help, -h                  show help
```

## aqua-registry create-pr-new-pkg

```console
$ aqua-registry create-pr-new-pkg --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry create-pr-new-pkg - Create a pull request to add new packages

USAGE:
   aqua-registry create-pr-new-pkg <package name> [<package name> ...]

DESCRIPTION:
   Create a pull request to add new packages.

   e.g.

   $ argd create-pr-new-pkg cli/cli

   This tool does the following things.

   1. Create a feature branch
   2. Create a commit
   3. Push the commit to origin
   4. Open a web browser to create a request with GitHub CLI


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry generate-registry

```console
$ aqua-registry generate-registry --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry generate-registry - Update registry.yaml

USAGE:
   aqua-registry gr

DESCRIPTION:
   Update registry.yaml

   This command updates registry.yaml on the repository root directory.
   Don't edit it manually, and if you update registry.yaml in the pkgs directory, don't forget to run this command.

   No argument is needed.


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry init

```console
$ aqua-registry init --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry init - Create configuration files

USAGE:
   $ argd init

DESCRIPTION:
   Create configuration files.

   * aqua.yaml
   * aqua-dev.yaml


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry patch-checksum

```console
$ aqua-registry patch-checksum --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry patch-checksum - Patch a checksum configuration

USAGE:
   $ argd patch-checksum <registry configuration file path>

DESCRIPTION:
   Patch a checksum configuration.

   e.g.

   $ argd patch-checksum pkgs/suzuki-shunsuke/tfcmt/registry.yaml


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry check-repo

```console
$ aqua-registry check-repo --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry check-repo - Check if GitHub Repository was transferred

USAGE:
   $ argd check-repo <package name>

DESCRIPTION:
   Check if GitHub Repository is transferred.
   This command succeeds if the repository isn't transferred.

   e.g.

   $ argd check-repo Azure/aztfy
   Azure/aztfexport


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry mv

```console
$ aqua-registry mv --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry mv - Rename a package

USAGE:
   $ argd mv <old package name> <new package name>

DESCRIPTION:
   Rename a package.

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry connect

```console
$ aqua-registry connect --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry connect - Connect to a Docker container with an interactive shell

USAGE:
   aqua-registry connect [<os>] [<arch>]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry lint

```console
$ aqua-registry lint --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry lint - Lint a package

USAGE:
   aqua-registry lint [<package name> or pkgs/**/pkg.yaml or pkgs/**/registry.yaml] ...

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

```console
$ aqua-registry remove --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry remove - Remove Docker containers

USAGE:
   aqua-registry remove

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

```console
$ aqua-registry remove-package --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry remove-package - Remove a package from Docker containers

USAGE:
   aqua-registry remove-package [<package name>]

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry resolve-conflict

```console
$ aqua-registry resolve-conflict --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry resolve-conflict - Resolve registry.yaml merge conflict with main

USAGE:
   aqua-registry resolve-conflict <PR number>

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry start

```console
$ aqua-registry start --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry start - Start Docker containers

USAGE:
   aqua-registry start [-r]

OPTIONS:
   --recreate, -r  Recreate the containers
   --help, -h      show help
```

## aqua-registry stop

```console
$ aqua-registry stop --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry stop - Stop Docker containers

USAGE:
   aqua-registry stop

OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry test

```console
$ aqua-registry test --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry test - Test a package in Docker containers

USAGE:
   aqua-registry test [-r] [<package name>]

OPTIONS:
   --recreate, -r  Recreate the containers
   --help, -h      show help
```

## aqua-registry version

```console
$ aqua-registry version --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry version - Show version

USAGE:
   aqua-registry version

OPTIONS:
   --json, -j  Output version in JSON format
   --help, -h  show help
```

## aqua-registry completion

```console
$ aqua-registry completion --help
NAME:
   aqua-registry completion - Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell

USAGE:
   aqua-registry completion

DESCRIPTION:
   Output shell completion script for bash, zsh, fish, or Powershell.
   Source the output to enable completion.

   # .bashrc
   source <(aqua-registry completion bash)

   # .zshrc
   source <(aqua-registry completion zsh)

   # fish
   aqua-registry completion fish > ~/.config/fish/completions/aqua-registry.fish

   # Powershell
   Output the script to path/to/autocomplete/aqua-registry.ps1 an run it.


OPTIONS:
   --help, -h  show help
```
<!-- docfresh end -->
